patches.hypothesis: Improved conditional null check and robustness
patches.changes: Added more robust null check, dropped hardcoded value, corrected edge cases.
patches.diff: Added more robust null check, dropped hardcoded value, corrected edge cases.
patches.original_hypothesis: getHeaderMap() method should only return a new header map if the headerMap is not null

patches.hypothesis: The bug was caused by the method returning a new map even when the header map was null, resulting in a NullPointerException when the map was accessed.
The `getHeaderMap()` method was not properly checking for the absence of a header map, leading to a `NullPointerException` when trying to create a new `LinkedHashMap` from a null value.
patches.changes: + Check for null header map before creating a new map.
patches.diff: + Check for null header map before creating a new map.
